items.desc_en: The deaths come after a day of violent protests against illegal migration in the town of Mossel Bay.
items.desc_zh: 死亡事件发生前，莫塞尔湾镇发生了一天针对非法移民的暴力抗议活动。

items.title_en: Job openings in April surged to 7.6 million, the highest in nearly two years
items.title_zh: 4月份职位空缺激增至760万个，为近两年来最高
items.desc_en: The Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that available employment hit 7.6 million for the month, a surge of 731,000 from the prior month.
items.desc_zh: 美国劳工统计局报告称，本月现有就业人数达到 760 万人，比上月增加 731,000 人。

items.title_en: The top 10 highest-paying jobs for teens in the U.S.—No. 1 isn't retail or food service
items.title_zh: 美国青少年收入最高的 10 个工作——排名第一1 不是零售或餐饮服务
items.desc_en: Babysitting may not be your ultimate career path, but having a job as a teenager can build transferable skills for young workers, according to experts.
items.desc_zh: 专家表示，保姆可能不是你的最终职业道路，但十几岁就开始工作可以为年轻工人培养可转移的技能。

items.title_en: Instagram AI chatbot tricked by hackers to give access to others' accounts
items.title_zh: Instagram AI 聊天机器人被黑客欺骗以访问他人帐户
items.desc_en: Some reports have linked the incident to recent cases of high-profile Instagram accounts being hijacked.
items.desc_zh: 一些报道将这一事件与最近高调的 Instagram 帐户被劫持的案件联系起来。

items.title_en: Maga influencer admits London Tube station assault
items.title_zh: Maga 影响者承认伦敦地铁站袭击事件
items.desc_en: Melissa Rein Lively accepted a caution, while an assault by beating charge against her was withdrawn.
items.desc_zh: 梅丽莎·雷因·莱弗利接受了警告，而对她的殴打指控也被撤回。

items.title_en: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
items.title_zh: “混乱”的人工智能推出如何伤害公司并让员工感到困惑
items.desc_en: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.
items.desc_zh: 一些公司向员工施加压力，要求其使用人工智能，但并未认真考虑人工智能的部署。

items.title_zh: HumToBeats
items.desc_en: Turn humming into AI-generated beats
items.desc_zh: 将哼唱变成人工智能生成的节拍

items.title_en: OpenAI let ChatGPT aid and abet mass shooters, Florida lawsuit claims
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达州诉讼称 OpenAI 让 ChatGPT 帮助和教唆大规模枪击事件
items.desc_en: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier alleges OpenAI and boss Sam Altman built a 'web of deceit'
items.desc_zh: 佛罗里达州总检察长 James Uthmeier 指控 OpenAI 和老板 Sam Altman 构建了一个“欺骗网”

items.title_en: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates - BBC
items.title_zh: 随着真主党冲突升级，以色列总理下令对贝鲁特郊区发动袭击 - BBC
items.desc_en: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates  BBCIsrael strikes south Lebanon after stepping back from Beirut attack  ReutersIsrael kills 11 in Lebanon, a day after Trump
items.desc_zh: 随着真主党冲突升级，以色列总理下令对贝鲁特郊区发动袭击 BBCI 以色列在从贝鲁特袭击中撤退后对黎巴嫩南部发动袭击 路透社 特朗普一天后，以色列在黎巴嫩杀死了 11 人

items.title_en: UK banks blocked from cyber AI tool Mythos get offer from rival OpenAI
items.title_zh: 英国银行被阻止使用网络人工智能工具 Mythos 获得竞争对手 OpenAI 的报价
items.desc_en: Nine banks have been offered access to GPT 5.5 Cyber, as fierce rival Anthropic has blocked previews of its tool.
items.desc_zh: 九家银行已获得 GPT 5.5 Cyber​​ 的访问权限，因为激烈的竞争对手 Anthropic 已阻止其工具的预览。

items.title_zh: 下一款《使命召唤》游戏的朝鲜入侵设定“有争议”
items.desc_en: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.
items.desc_zh: 开发商 Infinity Ward 表示，这款游戏将“植根于该系列闻名的军事真实性”。

items.title_en: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
items.title_zh: 宝马称人形机器人是汽车制造的“未来”
items.desc_en: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.
items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。

items.title_en: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
items.title_zh: 加州总检察长因 2023 年数据泄露起诉 23andMe 继任者
items.desc_en: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”
